pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage introducing CNC milling machines, services, and main user journeys.
primary_functions: Provide quick access to CNC milling machines, configurator, spare parts, training, services, and dealer locator.
Highlight featured machines, promotions, and key case studies.
Offer global search for machines, parts, and documentation.
Surface prominent calls-to-action for buying, configuring, or requesting quotes.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'CNC Milling Machines' primary CTA or header nav item
Click on 'Build Your Machine' primary CTA or header nav item
Click on 'Spare Parts' teaser or header nav item
Click on 'Training' teaser card or header nav item
Click on 'Maintenance Plans' teaser card or header nav item
Click on 'Aerospace' link in Industries section or header nav
Click on 'Downloads' link in hero or header nav
Click on 'Dealer Locator' in hero, header, or footer
Click on a featured machine model card
Click on a featured case study
Click on Cart icon in header

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Home' main navigation link
Direct visits to root URL or index.html

pages.name: Product Listing
pages.description: Category listing for CNC milling machines and other machine product groups.
primary_functions: Display a grid/list of CNC machines for a chosen category (e.g., CNC milling machines).
Provide filters for machine type (e.g., 3-axis), price range, table size, customer rating, and other specs.
Offer sorting controls such as spindle power, price, and popularity.
Allow users to open detailed machine pages by clicking product cards.

incoming_params.description: Product category to display, e.g., 'cnc_milling_machines'. Used to load category-specific filters and machine list.
Optional machine type filter, e.g., '3_axis', '5_axis'.
Optional maximum price filter (e.g., 60000).
Optional minimum table X dimension in mm (e.g., 800).
Optional minimum table Y dimension in mm (e.g., 400).
Optional minimum average customer rating filter, e.g., 4 for '4 stars & up'.
Sorting applied to listing, e.g., 'spindle_power_desc', 'price_asc'.
Current pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a machine product card in the listing
Apply filters and sort to find the most powerful 3-axis CNC mill under $60,000
Click on Cart icon in header from listing page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'CNC Milling Machines' header link pointing to products.html?categoryId=cnc_milling_machines
Accessed via links from Home or Industries pages with specific categoryId and filters

pages.name: Product Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific machine or spare part, including specifications and purchase actions.
primary_functions: Show complete specifications, images, and key performance data for a machine or part.
Allow users to set quantity and add the item to the shopping cart.
Display pricing, availability, and estimated lead time.
Link to related documentation, accessories, or compatible parts where applicable.

incoming_params.description: Identifier of the item to display. Interpreted as MachineModel.id when itemType is 'machine_model' (default) or SparePart.id when itemType is 'spare_part'.
Type of item: 'machine_model' or 'spare_part'. Determines whether getMachineModelDetails or getSparePartDetails is called.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Add to Cart' followed by 'View Cart' or header Cart icon
Click on a link to view manuals or documentation for this machine
Click on 'View compatible spare parts' link

access_methods.description: Accessed via product.html?id=...&itemType=machine_model|spare_part from listings and related content

pages.name: Shopping Cart
pages.description: Cart page summarizing selected machines and spare parts before checkout or sales follow-up.
primary_functions: List all items added to the cart with quantities, prices, and subtotals.
Allow users to change quantities or remove items.
Show order totals, taxes (if applicable), and estimated shipping or lead times.
Provide actions to proceed to checkout or to request a sales follow-up/quote for the cart contents.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an item name in the cart to view its detail page
Click on a 'Contact Sales' link in the cart page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Cart' link in main navigation
Accessed after adding items to cart from product detail pages

pages.name: Machine Configurator Landing
pages.description: Entry page for configurable CNC machines, letting users choose a machine family to configure.
primary_functions: Present available configurable machine categories (e.g., entry-level CNC milling machine).
Summarize each category with typical price range, power, and applications.
Let users start a specific configuration flow by selecting a category.
Explain how configuration and quote requests work for customized machines.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected configurable machine category. When present, can highlight that category or deep-link to the detail configurator.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a configurable machine category card such as 'Entry-Level CNC Milling Machine'

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Build Your Machine' header navigation link
Accessed from homepage CTA to start configuring a machine

pages.name: Machine Configurator Detail
pages.description: Interactive configuration page for a selected machine category with live pricing and quote request.
primary_functions: Allow users to select configuration options such as spindle power, automatic tool changer, coolant system, enclosure, and accessories.
Display a running price summary that updates as options are selected and highlights budget thresholds (e.g., under $45,000).
Enable users to adjust options (e.g., downgrade from premium to standard) to meet a target price.
Provide a 'Request a Quote' action that reveals or scrolls to a quote request form capturing user and project details.
Submit configuration and contact details as a quote request and show a confirmation message.

incoming_params.description: ConfigurableMachineCategory.id to configure (e.g., entry-level CNC milling machine). Required to load option groups and defaults.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Remain on page and show confirmation message after submitting quote request

access_methods.description: Accessed as build_machine.html?categoryId=... after a category is chosen on configurator landing

pages.name: Spare Parts Listing
pages.description: Catalog of spare parts with filters for machine models, model years, and part categories.
primary_functions: Allow users to select machine model and model year (e.g., ProMill 500, 2022) to filter compatible parts.
Provide filters for part category/component type (e.g., main spindle) and availability (e.g., in stock only).
Offer sorting by price, relevance, or availability (e.g., price low to high).
Display part cards that can be opened for detail and added to the cart.

incoming_params.description: Preselected machine model id (e.g., ProMill 500) to filter spare parts.
Preselected model year to filter spare parts compatible with that year (e.g., 2022).
Optional part category filter such as 'spindle' or 'main_spindle'.
Availability filter, e.g., 'in_stock'.
Sorting order such as 'price_asc' or 'price_desc'.
Current pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a spare part card such as 'Main Spindle for ProMill 500 (2022)'
Click on Cart icon in header from spare parts listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Spare Parts' header navigation link
Accessed via 'Spare Parts' footer link
Accessed with prefilled filters from product detail or support sections

pages.name: Training List
pages.description: Overview of training and education offerings with filtering by delivery method, skill level, and dates.
primary_functions: List available training courses with key details such as title, level, delivery method, and start date.
Provide filters for delivery method (online, in-person), skill level (beginner, intermediate, advanced), and date range.
Offer sorting by start date, duration, or price (e.g., earliest start date first).
Allow users to open detailed course pages for registration.

incoming_params.description: Filter for course delivery method, e.g., 'online'.
Filter for course level, e.g., 'beginner' or 'introductory'.
ISO date string for earliest course start date, e.g., '2024-09-01'.
Sorting on courses, e.g., 'start_date_asc'.
Current pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a course card to view its details and register

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Training' header navigation link
Accessed via 'Training & Education' footer link

pages.name: Training Detail
pages.description: Course detail and registration page for a specific training offering.
primary_functions: Present detailed course information including syllabus, schedule, prerequisites, and target audience.
Display start dates, duration, and delivery method (e.g., online beginner course).
Provide a registration/enrollment form capturing participant details, company, and contact info.
Submit training registrations and present a confirmation or next steps.

incoming_params.description: TrainingCourse.id for the course to display and register for.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Stay on page and show confirmation after successful registration submission

access_methods.description: Accessed via training_detail.html?courseId=... from training listings

pages.name: Dealer Locator
pages.description: Search interface for finding dealers and authorized service centers by location and radius.
primary_functions: Allow users to enter a postal/ZIP code and search radius (e.g., 100 km) to find nearby dealers.
Provide filters for dealer type, such as authorized service center, sales, or training partner.
Display results in a list (and optionally on a map) with distance from the entered location.
Offer sorting by distance or other attributes and allow navigation to dealer detail pages.

incoming_params.description: ZIP/postal code to search around, e.g., '60601'.
Search radius in kilometers, e.g., 100.
Optional flag 'true' to filter to authorized service centers.
Sort order for dealers, typically 'distance_asc'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a dealer result entry

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Dealer Locator' header navigation link
Accessed via 'Dealer Locator' footer link

pages.name: Dealer Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific dealer or service center with contact information.
primary_functions: Show dealer information including address, contact numbers, email, and service capabilities.
Display opening hours and coverage regions where relevant.
Provide a 'Contact this Dealer' form for sending service or sales inquiries.
Submit messages to the dealer and display a confirmation notice to the user.

incoming_params.description: Dealer.id for which details and contact form should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Stay on page and show confirmation after message submission

access_methods.description: Accessed via dealer_detail.html?dealerId=... from Dealer Locator search results

pages.name: Downloads
pages.description: Central hub for manuals, safety instructions, and other documentation downloads.
primary_functions: Let users filter downloads by product category (e.g., vertical machining centers) and specific model (e.g., VMC 850).
Provide filters for document type (user manual, safety instructions, datasheet, etc.) and language (e.g., English).
List matching documents with titles, versions, and file size.
Enable direct file downloads via download buttons or icons.

incoming_params.description: Product category to filter by, e.g., 'vertical_machining_centers'.
MachineModel.id to filter documents, e.g., the VMC 850 model.
Display model name filter, e.g., 'VMC 850'.
Filter by document type such as 'user_manual' or 'safety_instructions'.
Filter by document language, e.g., 'en'.
Pagination page number for document list.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Apply filters to find the English user manual for VMC 850
Change document type filter to find English safety instructions for VMC 850

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Downloads' header navigation link
Accessed via 'Documentation & Downloads' footer link

pages.name: Industries Overview
pages.description: Industry-focused overview pages, including aerospace, with related case studies and applications.
primary_functions: Present an overview of solutions for a selected industry (e.g., aerospace) with typical applications.
Highlight industry-specific benefits, recommended machines, and technologies.
Provide a 'Case Studies' section with filters for machine type (e.g., 5-axis machining center) and workpiece material (e.g., titanium).
Offer sorting of case studies (e.g., date newest first) and navigation to individual case study detail pages.

incoming_params.description: Industry.id such as 'aerospace' to determine which overview and case studies to show.
Optional case study filter by machine type, e.g., '5_axis' or '5_axis_machining_center'.
Optional case study filter by workpiece material, e.g., 'titanium'.
Case study sort order, e.g., 'date_desc' for newest first.
Case study pagination page number.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a case study in the aerospace case studies list
Click on a recommended 5-axis machining center link from industry overview

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Industries - Aerospace' header navigation link pointing to industries.html?industryId=aerospace
Accessed via 'Aerospace Case Studies' footer link pointing to industries.html?industryId=aerospace
Accessed with different industryId values via internal links

pages.name: Case Study Detail
pages.description: Detailed success story or case study page, including ability to favorite and share.
primary_functions: Present the full case study content including challenge, solution, and results.
Highlight machines, materials (e.g., titanium), and processes used in the project.
Provide an 'Add to Favorites' or bookmark action stored locally for the current user.
Offer a 'Copy Link' or 'Share Link' button to copy the case study URL to the clipboard.

incoming_params.description: CaseStudy.id of the case study to display.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on 'Back to aerospace case studies' or industry breadcrumb
Click on a related machine model mentioned in the case study

access_methods.description: Accessed via case_study.html?caseStudyId=... from industry case study lists or homepage highlights

pages.name: Maintenance Plans
pages.description: Listing and comparison of available maintenance and service contract plans.
primary_functions: Display maintenance plans with key features such as annual on-site inspection, response times, and coverage.
Provide filters for included features (e.g., annual on-site inspection) and monthly price range (e.g., max $200).
Offer sorting by price (e.g., price low to high) or coverage level.
Allow users to open individual plan detail pages to view full terms and subscribe.

incoming_params.description: Optional flag 'true' to filter plans that include an annual on-site inspection.
Maximum monthly price filter in plan currency, e.g., 200.
Sorting option for plans, e.g., 'price_asc'.
Pagination page number for maintenance plan listing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a maintenance plan card to view its details

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Maintenance Plans' header navigation link
Accessed via 'Maintenance Plans' footer link

pages.name: Maintenance Plan Detail
pages.description: Detail page for a specific maintenance plan, including subscription request form.
primary_functions: Show full details of the maintenance plan including services, visit frequency, and exclusions.
Present pricing structure and contract term lengths.
Provide a subscription or request form capturing contact info, company, and preferred start date.
Submit subscription requests and show a confirmation message or next steps.

incoming_params.description: MaintenancePlan.id of the plan to display and subscribe to.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Remain on page and show confirmation after subscription request submission

access_methods.description: Accessed via maintenance_plan_detail.html?planId=... from maintenance plan listing

pages.name: About
pages.description: Company information page describing the CNC manufacturer.
primary_functions: Describe the company history, mission, and core competencies in CNC technology.
Highlight manufacturing locations, certifications, and quality standards.
Introduce leadership, key milestones, and innovation focus.
Link to related pages such as training, services, or contact.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on links to training and education from About page
Click on 'Contact us' link on About page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'About' footer navigation link
Linked from external sites or search engines directly

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: General contact page for inquiries not handled via specific forms elsewhere.
primary_functions: Provide a general contact form for sales, support, and media inquiries.
Display headquarters address, phone numbers, and general email addresses.
Offer guidance on when to use the dealer locator, spare parts, or service request flows.
Optionally embed a simple map to the main office or showroom.

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected topic for contact form, e.g., 'sales', 'support', or 'media'.
Optional information about where the user came from, used for internal routing.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on guidance link to 'Find a dealer' from Contact page

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Contact' footer navigation link
Accessed directly from external sources or search engines

header_links.description: Homepage with overview of CNC milling solutions and key navigation
Browse all CNC milling machine models with filters and sorting
Start a configurable CNC machine build and request a quote
Find and order spare parts for CNC machines
View and register for CNC training courses
Browse and subscribe to CNC maintenance service plans
See aerospace solutions and titanium 5-axis machining case studies
Access manuals, safety instructions, and other documentation
Find authorized dealers and service centers by location
View and edit items added to the shopping cart

footer_links.description: Learn about the CNC manufacturer and its background
General contact form and company contact details
Overview of available CNC training courses
Spare parts catalog filtered by machine model and year
Manuals, safety documents, and software downloads
Locate nearby dealers and authorized service centers
Aerospace industry success stories and titanium machining case studies
